title: The Ninja Slushi Is Cheaper Than It’s Ever Been for Prime Day
gist: A Prime Day deal piece notes the original Ninja Slushi is at a record-low $200 (43% off) because Ninja has since launched two pricier, better successors (Slushi XL and Slushi Twist), with the discount hinting a next-gen model may be coming.

insights.claim: The original Ninja Slushi has dropped to a record-low $200 (around 43% off last year's retail) largely because Ninja released two newer, better machines that supersede it, illustrating deliberate price-laddering as new SKUs arrive.
insights.speaker: Matthew Korfhage
insights.so_what: Aggressive markdowns on the prior-gen model to clear inventory as successors launch is standard SharkNinja cadence; watch margin mix as the line broadens.
insights.quote: Ninja has since come out with two newer, snazzier, and frankly better machines.
insights.locator: But in some ways, I'm not surprised the price has come down.

insights.claim: Ninja has expanded the slushie line to three tiers: the original ($200 sale), the Slushi XL ($350, 96 oz, faster/colder), and the Slushi Twist ($400, dual-vessel, ~10-minute freeze), signaling rapid product proliferation in a category it pioneered.
insights.speaker: Matthew Korfhage
insights.so_what: Fast multi-tier expansion in a self-created category, fending off knockoffs, is the SharkNinja growth playbook worth tracking for share durability.
insights.quote: The Ninja Slushi XL ($350) that arrived this spring offers a bigger capacity... The flashier Ninja Slushi Twist ($400) also has a more powerful compressor
insights.locator: Ninja has since come out with two newer

insights.claim: The author speculates the steep discount may signal a next-gen Slushi is in the works, and notes the original outlasted a heap of eager knockoffs that conk out, pointing to a quality/brand moat against low-cost imitators.
insights.speaker: Matthew Korfhage
insights.so_what: Brand durability versus Amazon knockoffs supports pricing power; a possible next-gen launch implies continued line refresh cadence.
insights.quote: this Slushi will otherwise serve you well and won't conk out the way some of the Amazon knockoffs do
insights.locator: But this Slushi will otherwise serve you well
